THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZALVATIER, WALTER SALINAS, LIDIA M. RODRIGUEZ, JEAN P. ARIAS, GUADALUPE DELCID, VILMA QUINTANILLA, NORMA RODRIGUEZ, CARMEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 219 FELTON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $2,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COURT FINDS THAT ISABEL ARIAS AND MARIO TORRES ARE PERSONS WHO CAME INTO POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AFTER THE COMMENCE- MENT OF THIS ACTION AND ARE NOT PROPER CLAIMANTS TO A RIGHT OF POSSESSION. PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER FROM DEF $20.00 DAILY FOR EACH DAY THE DEF REMAINS IN POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES.

EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ZALVATIER, WALTER SALINAS, LIDIA M. RODRIGUEZ, JEAN P. ARIAS, GUADALUPE DELCID, VILMA QUINTANILLA, NORMA RODRIGUEZ, CARMEN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT AFTER TRIAL
